title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 24.
content:
There was an Old Person of Buda,
    Whose conduct grew ruder and ruder;
    Till at last, with a hammer,
    They silenced his clamour,
    By smashing that Person of Buda
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 24.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
